title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at 3M India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
